feel.title: How it feels

feel.body_other: Across {{count}} rated sessions, your habits feel {{word}}{{trend}}{{best}}

confidence.sub: Every insight is shown — confidence grows as your days add up ({{days}} so far).

forecast.title: Forecast
forecast.lockedBody: See when your next insight, streaks, and automaticity will land at your current pace.
forecast.nextUnlockPrefix: At your current pace you’ll unlock
forecast.allUnlocked: Every insight tier is unlocked — you’re in rare air. 🛡️

insight.streakActive: You’re on a {{streak}}-day streak. Your longest run so far is {{longest}}.
insight.streakReset: Your streak reset — your longest run was {{longest}}. One win today starts the next.
insight.rhythmEmpty: Keep logging with the timer to reveal your best day and time.
insight.rhythmDayTime: You show up most on {{day}}s, around {{hour}}. Stack new habits there — momentum is on your side.
insight.rhythmDay: You show up most on {{day}}s. Stack new habits there — momentum is on your side.
insight.rhythmTime: You show up most around {{hour}}. Stack new habits there — momentum is on your side.
insight.anchorEmpty: Complete a few sessions to find your anchor habit.
insight.anchor_one: {{title}} is your anchor — {{count}} session logged. Anchor habits make the rest easier to start.
insight.anchor_other: {{title}} is your anchor — {{count}} sessions logged. Anchor habits make the rest easier to start.
insight.mixEmpty: As you log across areas, your focus will show up here.
insight.mixIntro_one: Most of your energy goes to {{label}} ({{count}} session).
insight.mixIntro_other: Most of your energy goes to {{label}} ({{count}} sessions).
insight.mixNoGoal: Tie it to a goal to make it count double.
insight.resilienceIntro: Your longest unbroken run is {{longest}} days.
insight.resilienceAtBest: You’re at your best right now — protect the streak.
insight.resilienceComeback_one: You’ve done it before, so you can do it again — you’re {{count}} day in now.
insight.resilienceComeback_other: You’ve done it before, so you can do it again — you’re {{count}} days in now.
insight.automaticScience: Research suggests automaticity lands on average around 66 days — but you’ll feel it before any number does.
